FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Barclays flags potential strong dollar rally amid oil-driven risk-off
Nasdaq stalling confirms USD safe-haven bid
AI identifies MA20 as key technical support level

FX.comment: Fundamental catalysts (oil risk, Nasdaq weakness) align with technical support at MA20
